C : ℝ
f : ↑(spectrum ℂ a) → ℂ

⊢ ∀ (m : ℂ) (x_1 : H),

      (RingHom.id ℂ) m • ComplexMeasure.integral (@cfc_toComplexMeasure H inst✝² inst✝¹ inst✝ a ha x x_1) f
